name: FinancialDimensionCatalogueLifecycleEvents
description: Append-only create, rename, archive, and reactivate history for account, category, payment instrument, cardholder, and spend-pool catalogues.
schema_def: catalogue_lifecycle_event: id ULID; catalogueKind account, category, payment_instrument, cardholder, or spend_pool; entityId; action create, rename, archive, or reactivate where allowed; previousLabel and newLabel as applicable; required reason for corrective actions; actor; trusted time. Current labels and active state derive from history. Historical transaction, attribution, pool, category, evidence, and reconciliation references use RESTRICT. Archive prevents new assignments but preserves prior facts and query history.
